name: Gitea With Postgresql
tagline: Gitea is a self-hosted, lightweight Git service, offering version control, collaboration, and code hosting.
description:
Gitea is a self-hosted, lightweight Git service, offering version control, collaboration, and code hosting.

Docs: https://docs.gitea.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  gitea:
    image: gitea/gitea:latest
    environment:
      - USER_UID=1000
      - USER_GID=1000
      - GITEA__database__DB_TYPE=postgres
      - GITEA__database__HOST=postgresql
      - GITEA__database__NAME=${POSTGRESQL_DATABASE-gitea}
      - GITEA__database__USER=u448358af35
      - GITEA__database__PASSWD=364c8c4ebc226f4623c0d3e0f3302656
    volumes:
      - gitea-data:/data
      - gitea-timezone:/etc/timezone:ro
      - gitea-localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
    depends_on:
      postgresql:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:3000
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42043:80
  postgresql:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    volumes:
      - gitea-postgresql-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u448358af35
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=364c8c4ebc226f4623c0d3e0f3302656
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRESQL_DATABASE:-gitea_with_postgresql}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv451d38d5} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-gitea_with_postgresql}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  gitea-data: null
  gitea-timezone: null
  gitea-localtime: null
  gitea-postgresql-data: null
